description_long: This is a medium-sized, square wooden storage box with a weathered, rustic appearance, featuring vertical planks and a dark wood frame. The top surface displays a prominent yellow caution sign reading 'CAUTION: DO NOT TOUCH' with a pizza slice graphic, suggesting it may be used for humorous or attention-grabbing purposes in an urban setting. One side of the box is marked with red, handprint-like smears, while another side shows white scuff marks and scratches, indicating frequent handling or rough use. The fourth side is decorated with colorful stickers, including a rainbow skull and a stylized wave, adding a playful, urban character. The box appears solid and sturdy, likely constructed primarily from wood, and is suitable for storing or transporting items. Its flat top and robust build make it capable of supporting additional objects placed on it.
description: A weathered wooden storage box with a caution sign on top, red smears, scuff marks, and colorful stickers on its sides. It has a rustic, urban look and appears sturdy and functional.
description_view_0: This view shows a side with red, handprint-like smears on the wood, and the top with a yellow caution sign.
description_view_1: This side features white scuff marks and scratches, with the caution sign visible on the top.
description_view_2: This side is mostly plain with some weathering and scratches, and the caution sign is partially visible on the top.
description_view_3: This view displays two colorful stickers—a rainbow skull and a wave—on the side, with the caution sign on the top.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: adhesive caution sign and decorative stickers
attribute_placement_location: floor, garage, sidewalk, or urban outdoor area
